title: Add workspace guard to mesh pr to prevent running from wrong worktree
description: handle_pr has no workspace check before writing the review packet and updating work item status. An agent running mesh pr from the shared root (on main) instead of the claimed task worktree silently produces a review packet anchored to the wrong branch. handle_review already has the guard (cli.py:527-531); mesh pr needs the same pattern. Also strengthen the mesh claim output from advisory Next: to REQUIRED: so agents cannot miss the worktree switch instruction.
acceptance_criteria: mesh pr <WORK-ID> exits with an error and prints Next: cd <worktree> when called from any directory other than the claimed task worktree
mesh pr proceeds normally when called from the correct worktree
mesh pr proceeds normally when worktree_policy is off (no worktree recorded on claim)
mesh claim output changes Next: to REQUIRED: for the worktree cd instruction
Tests cover: guard blocks wrong-dir call, guard passes correct-dir call, guard skipped when no worktree
